mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id as "userId", channel, template_code as "templateCode", subject, reference_type as "referenceType", reference_id as "referenceId", sent_at as "sentAt", read_at as "readAt", retry_count as "retryCount", state_id as "stateId" FROM notifications
AND user_id = #{userId} AND channel = #{channel} AND reference_type = #{referenceType} AND reference_id = #{referenceId} AND state_id = #{stateId}

SELECT id, user_id as "userId", channel, template_code as "templateCode", subject, reference_type as "referenceType", reference_id as "referenceId", sent_at as "sentAt", read_at as "readAt", retry_count as "retryCount", state_id as "stateId" FROM notifications WHERE id = #{id}
